raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The California State University system possesses almost 700,000 human remains and cultural objects.",
    "Only about six percent of campus collections have been returned as required by the Native American Graves Protection and Repatriation Act.",
    "Decades after a federal and state requirement to repatriate remains, the CSU system has made little progress.",
    "Consultation with tribes is necessary to ensure respectful repatriation of cultural artifacts.",
    "Failure to consult tribes during the review of collections undermines tribal sovereignty.",
    "AB 389 requires campuses with more than 100 sets of remains or cultural items to have full-time experienced repatriation coordinators.",
    "The bill mandates the establishment of a systemwide NAGPRA policy for consistent repatriation processes."
  ]
}
```
